note: V11 Phase 2 — C12 wires miner SbPoW transport (resolves C11 blocker). The production sost-miner now emits header version 2 + miner_pubkey + miner_signature on every submitblock JSON for candidates at height >= V11_PHASE2_HEIGHT (= 10,000, unchanged). The node parses version/pubkey/signature, validates lengths (33/64 bytes hex), feeds them into ValidateSbPoW, and uses them in the v2 block_id rebuild. Pre-Phase-2 v1 submissions are unchanged (no pubkey/signature, version defaults to 1). The miner aborts pre-mining when chain >= V11_PHASE2_HEIGHT and --wallet/--mining-key-label are missing. NO activation-height change. Tests: ON build 14/14 targeted PASS (incl. new phase2-sbpow-submit integration test, 48 assertions), OFF build 10/10 targeted PASS. Pre-existing failures unchanged (bond-lock, popc, escrow, dynamic-rewards, checkpoints — see KNOWN_TEST_FAILURES.md). See docs/V11_PHASE2_RELEASE_NOTES.md C12 section. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
